name: codex-loop
description: Loop skills for goal-first planning, review-driven implementation, and UI polish workflows in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run goal, review, feedback, and UI polish loops.
interface.longDescription: Codex Loop provides reusable skills for slow, verified Codex workflows: turn rough objectives into reviewed plans, implement with severity-based review feedback, and iterate UI changes with browser-backed checks.
defaultPrompt: Use a loop to plan this before coding.
Run review feedback until high-risk issues are resolved.
Polish this UI and verify it in the browser.
